mapper.insert: insert into role(name, sn, description) values(#{name}, #{sn}, #{description})
mapper.update: update role set name = #{name}, sn = #{sn}, description = #{description} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, sn, description from role where id = #{id}
select id, name, sn, description from role

select id, name, sn, description from role
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and sn like concat('%', #{sn}, '%')
